key.name: display-mode
key.description: Controls whether FluxBar shows total speed or download and upload speeds separately.

key.name: unit-mode
key.description: Controls whether FluxBar shows speeds in bytes or bits.

key.name: label-color
key.description: Optional hexadecimal color for the FluxBar panel label.

key.name: update-interval-ms
key.description: Controls how often FluxBar refreshes network speed, in milliseconds.
